titleInfo.title: Abridged Essence of the Meditation Method

mods.abstract: The Abridged Essence of Meditation (Siwei lueyaofa 思惟略要法) is a short sutra traditionally attributed to Kumārajīva (T#617, 15: 295c-300c) that may be best described as a meditation manual. By contents it is very close to the Essence of the Meditation Manual Consisting of Five Gates (Wumen chanjing yaoyong fa 五門禪經要用法(T#619, 15:325c-333a) by 佛陀蜜多 and to a Dunhuang manuscript entitled Buddha contemplation (Guanfo 觀佛 , S. 2585, T#2914, 85:1459c-1461c). 89-91 believes that when the Essence of the Meditation Manual Consisting of Five Gates was compiled, parts of it have been taken from the Abridged Essence of Meditation. (Demiéville 1954, 359) thought that this text "... may not be a translation of Kumārajīva, but it must date from around his age." (Yamabe 112) holds on to the attribution to Kumārajīva out of lack for better alternatives, and groups it together with the Manual on the samādhi of Sitting Meditation (Zuochan sanmei jing 坐禪三昧經, T#614, 15:269c-286a) and the ...... (Chanfa yaojie 禪法要解, T#616, 15:286b-297c), both attributed to Kumārajīva, and the Yogācārabhumi (Damo duoluo chanjing 達摩多羅禪經, T#618, 15: 300c-325c)by Buddhasena (traditionally attributed to Buddhabhadra 佛陀跋陀羅), which are said to be the meditation manual closest to the orthodox Sarvastivāda tradition, already containing many Mahāyānist elements, but without many symbolic images. In contrast to this group stand the texts attributed to Dharmamitra (like the Essence of the Meditation Manual Consisting of Five Gates) and Juqu Jingsheng that are far more mystical, poorly organized, and contain many Chinese elements. They were probably compiled in China and are close to the Sutra on the Ocean-like samādhi of Buddha Contemplation Spoken by the Buddha (Guan sanmei hai jing T#643, 15:645-697). The text of the Abridged Essence of Meditation has the following sections: 1. Introduction 2. 四無量觀法 3. 不淨觀法 4. 白骨觀法 5. 觀佛三昧法 6. 生身觀法 7. 法身觀法 8. 十方諸佛觀法 9. 觀無量壽佛法 10. 諸法實相觀法 11. 法華三昧觀法

titleInfo.title: New edition of the Buddhist canon in the Taishō era
